events.title: Spring 2026 STEM & Technology Career Fair
events.subtitle: On-campus fair featuring 20+ STEM, engineering, and tech employers
events.description: Meet with employers hiring for internships, co-ops, and full-time roles across software, data analytics, engineering, healthcare, and more. Bring multiple copies of your resume and be prepared for brief conversations with recruiters.

events.title: Virtual Internship Search Strategies
events.subtitle: How to find and apply for internships effectively
events.description: Learn how to structure your internship search, find role-specific postings, and tailor your application materials. We will cover search tools, networking tactics, and how to read internship descriptions.

events.title: Virtual Internship Resume Clinic
events.subtitle: Hands-on resume workshop for internship applicants
events.description: Bring a draft of your resume and get live feedback from career advisors on how to tailor it for internship postings, especially in STEM and business fields.

events.title: First-Generation Student Career Mixer
events.subtitle: Evening networking event for first-generation students
events.description: Connect with first-generation alumni and employers who are committed to supporting first-gen students. Light refreshments will be served and conversation prompts will be provided to make networking easier.

events.title: Coding Interview Basics Workshop
events.subtitle: Introductory skills workshop for technical interviews
events.description: Learn the structure of typical software engineering coding interviews, how to talk through problems, and common question types. This workshop is designed for students preparing for their first technical interviews.

events.title: Software Engineer Info Session with CloudBridge Technologies
events.subtitle: Learn about software engineer internships and new grad roles
events.description: CloudBridge Technologies will overview their software engineer and software engineering internship roles, hiring timeline, and tips for standing out in the process.
events.location_name: Career Center Room 201 & Online via Zoom

events.title: Tech Careers Coffee Chat & Networking
events.subtitle: Informal networking with employers and alumni in tech
events.description: Drop in to this relaxed coffee chat to meet recruiters and alumni working in software, data analytics, and product management. Short introductions will be followed by open networking.

events.title: Introduction to Data Analytics Workshop
events.subtitle: Hands-on introduction to data analytics tools and careers
events.description: Explore core concepts in data analytics, common tools (Excel, SQL, Python), and how to talk about analytics projects on your resume. Includes a short guided exercise using sample data.

events.title: Data Analytics Careers at Nova Analytics – Info Session
events.subtitle: Employer info session with Nova Analytics
events.description: Recruiters and analysts from Nova Analytics will discuss internship and full-time data analytics roles, showcase real project examples, and share tips for building a strong analytics portfolio.

events.title: Data Analytics Career Day
events.subtitle: Mini career fair focused on data analytics and business intelligence
events.description: Meet employers hiring for data analyst, business intelligence, and data science roles across technology, consulting, and finance. Includes brief employer talks and open networking at employer tables.

events.title: Software Engineer Info Session with CloudBridge Technologies
events.subtitle: Learn about software engineer internships and full-time roles
events.description: CloudBridge Technologies recruiters will share details about open software engineer internship and new grad positions, tech stack, interview process, and tips for preparing application materials.

events.title: Software Engineer Roles at QuantumLeap AI – Info Session
events.subtitle: Opportunities in AI and machine learning engineering
events.description: QuantumLeap AI will discuss software engineer and machine learning engineer internships and full-time roles, including teams, projects, and technical interview expectations.

events.title: Virtual Practice Interview Day
events.subtitle: One-on-one mock interviews with employer volunteers
events.description: Sign up for a 30-minute virtual practice interview with an employer or alumni volunteer. Choose from behavioral, consulting case, or software engineering practice interviews.
events.location_name: Online via Zoom (individual links sent after registration)

events.title: Virtual Technical Mock Interview Night
events.subtitle: Small-group coding and technical practice interviews
events.description: Work through technical interview questions in small groups with guidance from a facilitator. Focuses on software engineering and data science style questions.

events.title: First-Generation Student Job & Internship Search Lab
events.subtitle: Evening working session for first-generation students
events.description: Designed specifically for first-generation students, this workshop provides time to work on your job or internship search with staff support. We will cover search tools, networking language, and common challenges first-gen students encounter.

events.title: Resume Bootcamp
events.subtitle: Revamp your resume before application deadlines
events.description: This intensive bootcamp walks you through how to structure your resume, write strong bullet points, and tailor your document for internships, full-time roles, and graduate programs.

events.title: Helio Robotics Engineering Open House
events.subtitle: On-campus employer event with Helio Robotics
events.description: Meet engineers from Helio Robotics, see demos of current projects, and learn about internship and co-op opportunities in robotics, embedded systems, and computer vision.

events.title: STEM Alumni Networking Panel & Mixer
events.subtitle: Panel discussion followed by networking with STEM alumni
events.description: Hear from alumni working in software engineering, data analytics, and engineering design, then stay for an informal networking mixer.
events.location_name: Science Center Auditorium & Online via Zoom
